best_bet.reason: The bigger surf at 2 to 4 feet plus mostly sunny skies make this the stronger pick over Georgetown County's smaller 1 to 2 foot waves, even with the moderate rip current risk.

counties.name: Horry County

counties.name: Georgetown County
counties.beaches: Pawleys Island · Litchfield Beach · Huntington Beach State Park
